question: Largest scoring run in an NBA Finals game since 2009-10
notes: PLAN §12 row 10. Top 5 scoring runs in NBA Finals games since 2009-10. team_id 1610612744 = GSW (Golden State Warriors); 1610612749 = MIL (Milwaukee Bucks); 1610612738 = BOS (Boston Celtics); 1610612748 = MIA (Miami Heat). Verified by direct query against data/nba.duckdb using the gaps-and-islands algorithm in pbp_aggregate/largest_scoring_run.sql, after normalizing free-throw shot_result/shot_value in fact_pbp_event. Public-source cross-check: 2022 G6 Warriors 21-0 (ESPN/Elias, CBS Sports, NBA.com), 2019 G2 Warriors 20-0 (USA Today, NBA.com).
